name: AMS
description: Combined AMS card: chamber temp + humidity bar + drying status (AMS 2 Pro / AMS HT) + 4 tray rows. Active tray gets a green left-edge accent. Multi-AMS: ?ams=0|1|2|3 (defaults to AMS #1).

bindings.label: AMS unit object
bindings.hint: Point at any AMS unit by index. e.g. $.print.ams.ams[4] for the 5th unit on a 5-AMS Hub setup.
